tasks.title: 补 object/contact supervision probe
tasks.description: Why now: object_contact 在 robot_still 只有约 0.21，说明单靠 layered image 不足。Deliverable: object/contact head 的弱监督方案，对比 color/geometry/Qwen layer features。Acceptance: poster 和 robot_still 都输出 object/contact mask；记录 contact recall/precision、penetration/sliding proxy。

comments.author: Progress
comments.body: [2026-05-23] Probe v0 finished. Built 5 heads (qwen_baseline / color_saliency / geom_compact / qwen_filtered / color_x_qwen). Run: .venv/bin/python contact_object_head.py. Robot_still cup IoU: H2 geom_compact 0.810 vs Qwen 0.212 (3.8x lift), precision 1.0, penetration_vs_gt_scene 0.0. Poster silhouette IoU: H2 geom_compact 0.856 vs Qwen 0.514 (1.7x lift), precision 1.0, penetration_vs_gt_scene 0.0. Contact event proxy (touch-within-4px-of-robot): TP=1 FP=0 FN=0 TN=1 across both scenes for all heads — sanity, not discriminating, N=2. Sliding proxy: unmeasurable_single_image (defer to temporal probe). Key reads: (1) color is the strongest feature; (2) Qwen non-base layers alone are worse than nothing (H3 IoU 0.016/0.242, penetration 0.95/0.75 — floods the image); (3) Qwen layers do not add info on top of color (H4 ≈ H2); (4) chained head: robot mask subtraction is essential. Penetration vs Qwen base = 1.0 for every head (uninformative; Qwen base alpha=1 everywhere); replaced with penetration_vs_gt_scene as primary. Artifacts: contact_object_head.py, contact-object-head.md, outputs_contact_object_head/score_summary.json, outputs_contact_object_head/{robot_still,poster}/mask_*.png + overlays. Acceptance: poster+robot_still both produce object/contact mask; contact recall/precision recorded; penetration proxy recorded; sliding marked unmeasurable as expected.

comments.author: Progress
comments.body: [2026-05-23] Probe v0 finished. Built explicit robot/ego head 'chromatic_dark_cc' = (chroma<0.08 AND lum<0.55) -> 4-CC -> keep CCs touching URDF-projected base box. Run: .venv/bin/python robot_ego_head.py. Results vs synthetic GT (outputs_robot_ego_head/score_summary.json): robot_still robot_ego IoU 0.625 (precision 0.988, recall 0.629) vs Qwen baseline 0.138 — 4.5x lift. Poster false-positive control: 0 px (vs chromatic_dark alone which lights up the dark title bar at 31k px). The URDF base-box CC step is the load-bearing piece that suppresses no-robot false positives. Recall ceiling 0.629 is a GT-bbox artifact (slanted arm polygon inside an axis-aligned rect); precision 0.988 confirms head is tight. Report: robot-ego-head.md. Overlays: outputs_robot_ego_head/robot_still/overlay_{qwen,cd_cc}.png. Acceptance met (robot_still robot_ego max-IoU >> Qwen baseline).

comments.author: Host verification
comments.body: Host accepted robot/ego head v0: chromatic_dark_cc + URDF/base-box connected-component prior reaches robot_still IoU 0.625 vs Qwen baseline 0.138, precision 0.988, poster false positive 0 px; artifacts robot_ego_head.py, robot-ego-head.md, score_summary.json and overlays recorded.

tasks.title: 把单图 layer probe 扩展到短视频 temporal consistency
tasks.description: Why now: world model 要服务视频/IDM，PSD/单图 round-trip 只是静态验证。Deliverable: 3-5 帧短序列 layer propagation 或逐帧 decomposition + consistency metric。Acceptance: 输出 temporal flicker / mask IoU over time / object-contact continuity 指标，并列出最小训练目标。

comments.author: Progress
comments.body: [2026-05-23] Probe v0 finished. 5-frame synthetic sequence: arm reaches cup at t=2, slides it +8/+18 px at t=3,4. Per-frame heads = robot_ego (chromatic_dark_cc with frame-adaptive base box) + object_contact (geom_compact with fixed workspace prior, not per-frame EE box — key v1 change so cup is detected pre-contact). GT geometry promoted from axis-aligned bbox to polygon-level (matches drawn shapes), lifting IoU ceiling. Run: .venv/bin/python make_video_frames.py && .venv/bin/python video_temporal_probe.py. Headline metrics: per-frame IoU >=0.97 across S/O/R for all 5 frames. Temporal pair: |pred_iou - gt_iou| < 0.015 on every pair (head change-rate tracks true motion-rate); flicker rate stays at the 'real geometric motion' floor (scene <0.6%, object 0% pre-contact / 33-41% sliding, robot 4-16% depending on tip-speed). Contact timeline: pred==GT exactly (F,F,T,T,T), TP=3 FP=0 FN=0 TN=2, recall=1.0 precision=1.0, 1 transition both sides, no flicker transitions. Sliding consistency mean_cos = 0.9996 across 2 contact pairs. Centroid drift per layer cleanly separates static scene (<0.2 px/frame jitter) vs sliding cup (~9 px/frame during contact) vs reaching arm (~7.7 px/frame reach -> 1.9 px/frame contact). Minimum training objectives listed in §9 of video-temporal-probe.md: (1) per-frame recon, (2) layer-isolated recon, (3) static-layer temporal-IoU, (4) motion-warped IoU for moving layers, (5) contact-event continuity (dwell threshold), (6) slot-identity Hungarian, (7) sliding-direction cosine, (8) kinematic-feasibility on robot centroid. Min set for v1: 1+3(scene)+4(warp)+5. Artifacts: make_video_frames.py, video_temporal_probe.py, video-temporal-probe.md, outputs_video_temporal_probe/score_summary.json + per-frame masks + overlays, test_video/.

tasks.title: 实现 drag/teleop/mixed fine-tuning loader baseline
tasks.description: Why now: comparison TODO 需要先有统一 loader，才谈训练结果。Deliverable: loader + split config，支持 teleop-only、drag-only、70/30 mixed 三路。Acceptance: dry-run 打印 batch shapes、episode counts、missing stream report。

comments.author: Result
comments.body:
Baseline loader delivered + dry-run + tests.

ARTIFACTS (sha256)
- /home/lv-robotics/workspace/ARX_A5_Dual_ARM/training/drag_demo_loader.py = cc5588dbd91b966218442374c5463187d08b02ae446abfff368a8fb0f9b7ef9c
- /home/lv-robotics/workspace/ARX_A5_Dual_ARM/training/dry_run_loader.py   = d9955093bcb434e9eae89fb04f865d9e0d7536450fac6db850bfb5c0d9799805
- /home/lv-robotics/workspace/ARX_A5_Dual_ARM/training/test_drag_demo_loader.py = fdeaac339d334477d7f6086b2db2b65fedbb651134c0e5080278367313932500
- /home/lv-robotics/workspace/ARX_A5_Dual_ARM/training/split_config.json   = 180a80b2f4935d4442beb2b6d7b885d3327fb1f42d287429a06d265714fc9000
- /home/lv-robotics/workspace/.verifier_reports/loader_dry_run.json        = 4eb0498b6a1dcd43001d6d700d5c630c00e9efd3c6afa0dbaca3422f832aea45 (dry-run report)

DESIGN
- Dataset class DragDemoDataset (PyTorch); each item is one timestep: rgb dict per cam (uint8 HxWx3), state float32 (14,), action float32 (14,) sampled +100 ms forward in state.pkl time; meta {source, dataset, episode, episode_idx, t_sample_ms}.
- Sampling grid: state.pkl (~60 Hz). For each state index we nearest-lookup the RGB frame on every camera via image_timestamps.pkl — handles per-camera asynchronous rates without forcing global sync.
- split_config.json schema (drag_demo_split.v1): sources = {drag, teleop}, each pointing at a manifest path + episode_filter; modes = {drag_only, teleop_only, mixed_70_30}. Today teleop.manifest=null because no teleop has been collected yet.
- Mixture rule: anchor universe on the binding source. If a mode requires share>0 from a source with 0 loaded episodes, the dataset returns 0 episodes and tags 'mixture_degraded' in sources_summary — refuses to silently downgrade a 70/30 mix to drag-only when teleop is missing.

DRY-RUN (cmd: cd ~/workspace/ARX_A5_Dual_ARM/training && ~/miniconda3/envs/robo_ctrl/bin/python dry_run_loader.py --batch-size 4 --samples-per-episode 4 --image-size 320 180 --json-out ~/workspace/.verifier_reports/loader_dry_run.json)

- mode=drag_only:    mixture {drag:1.0, teleop:0.0}; episodes=19 (manifest 19 -> loaded 19 -> after_mixture 19); samples=76; missing_streams=none.
  batch shapes (B=4): state (4,14) float32 ; action (4,14) float32 ; rgb[cam_top] (4,180,320,3) uint8 ; rgb[cam_left_wrist] (4,180,320,3) uint8 ; rgb[cam_right_wrist] (4,180,320,3) uint8 ; first meta: {source:'drag', dataset:'egg_to_bowl', episode:'0010', episode_idx:0, t_sample_ms:1779375420520}
- mode=teleop_only:  mixture {drag:0.0, teleop:1.0}; episodes=0; samples=0; missing_streams=[{source:'teleop', missing:'manifest', manifest_path:null}]; batch skipped (empty).
- mode=mixed_70_30:  mixture {drag:0.7, teleop:0.3}; episodes=0 (drag truncated to 0 because teleop has 0); samples=0; missing_streams=[{source:'teleop', missing:'manifest', manifest_path:null}]; batch skipped.

TESTS (cmd: cd ~/workspace/ARX_A5_Dual_ARM/training && ~/miniconda3/envs/robo_ctrl/bin/python -m unittest test_drag_demo_loader -v)
- Ran 10 tests in 1.496s OK ; covers: split_config parse + sums-to-1 ; unknown mode rejected ; drag_only yields >0 eps with no missing streams ; teleop_only with missing manifest yields 0 ; mixed refuses silent degrade with current data ; batch tensor shapes/dtypes on the real manifest ; synthetic-teleop manifest test where mixed_70_30 actually mixes ~70/30 with both sources tagged in meta.

HOW TO ENABLE MIXED ONCE TELEOP DATA EXISTS
1. Run sop_episode_verifier.py on the teleop raw_data root to produce a teleop verifier JSON.
2. Run build_initial_batch_manifest.py with --out /…/teleop_batch_manifest.json on that JSON.
3. Edit split_config.json -> sources.teleop.manifest to that path.
4. Rerun dry_run_loader.py; mixed_70_30 will report non-zero episode counts and real batch shapes.

REMAINING REMOTELY-UNFINISHABLE WORK
- Actual teleop data collection (separate physical session) is not something a remote Claude session can perform.
- Sequence augmentation (action chunks / image stacking) is downstream of this baseline; pick after first training pass.

tasks.title: 决定 initial batch final-stillness threshold
tasks.description: Why now: 当前严格 0.02 rad 只有 13/100，relax 到 0.50 可到 94；不先定 threshold，后续 collect/fine-tune 都会反复。Deliverable: 选择 strict onsite recollect 或 relaxed threshold，并写入 verifier config。Acceptance: threshold、理由、风险和数据数量都记录在 TODO comment 中。

comments.author: Progress
comments.body: [Codex route 2026-05-23] Route: do not wait on pure preference. Compute strict vs relaxed final-stillness thresholds on the current 13/100 curated batch, report how many episodes pass each, and recommend one threshold before scaling to 100. Masquerade motivates data editing, but this project’s pass/fail gate is contact/object preservation and downstream loader usefulness.

comments.author: Result
comments.body:
Decision: stillness_max_range_rad = 0.10 rad (≈5.7 deg) over a 2.0 s trailing window on both arms.

RATIONALE
- 0.02 rad (~1.15 deg) is below the arm-at-rest encoder/torque-balance noise plus passive gripper-finger relaxation after release. Yields 13/163 — production cannot meet it without retraining operators.
- 0.10 rad (~5.7 deg) keeps the 'operator actively halted the arm' signal: a wrist twitch or finger settle passes, but a still-rotating spatula does not. Yields 19/163 — modest gain, quality preserved.
- 0.20 rad (~11 deg) lets the right wrist still be actively moving at the marker, corrupting the task-end signal the policy learns. Reject.
- 0.50 rad (~29 deg) is no-op; rejected.

DATA COUNTS (raw_data, 163 episodes scanned)
- Before (0.02 rad): n_counted_toward_target = 13/100; n_near_miss_stillness_only = 108
- After  (0.10 rad): n_counted_toward_target = 19/100; n_near_miss_stillness_only = 102
  by_dataset: egg_to_bowl 16/103, egg_scoop_v1 3/27, egg_scoop_v2 0/2 (always missing cam_top)
  delta_to_target = 81

NEW BATCH PATHS (19; right-arm trailing range shown — all <= 0.10 rad):
  egg_scoop_v1/{0000,0004,0010}  (R 0.0023-0.0027)
  egg_to_bowl/{0000,0001,0003,0004,0006,0008,0009,0010,0015,0041,0054,0072,0093,0095,0096,0101}  (R 0.0027-0.0839)

RISK & MITIGATIONS
- Risk 1: Six newly-included episodes have right-arm range 0.04-0.09 rad (≈2-5 deg) — the wrist is settling, not perfectly halted. Impact on imitation-learning: policy may learn a slight 'residual jitter at task end' rather than a hard stop. Mitigation: keep a strict-tier eval set (the 13 episodes at <= 0.02 rad) for held-out scoring of the policy's terminal stability.
- Risk 2: Operators may notice the relaxation and trend looser over time. Mitigation: brief at the 2026-05-23 onsite session — 'after rotation, drop hands away from controls and pause to a full count of 2'. Keep the strict tier visible in the manifest so quality drift is detectable in subsequent verifier reports.
- Risk 3: egg_scoop_v2 still 0/2 because the 2-cam variant lacks cam_top. Not a threshold problem — drop egg_scoop_v2 from the candidate pool until it is re-collected with the 3-cam stack.

WRITTEN TO VERIFIER CONFIG
- VerifierConfig.stillness_max_range_rad default: 0.02 → 0.10 (sop_episode_verifier.py)
- CLI default for --stillness-threshold-rad: 0.02 → 0.10
- Tests still pass: cd ~/workspace/ARX_A5_Dual_ARM/data_collection && ~/miniconda3/envs/robo_ctrl/bin/python -m unittest test_sop_episode_verifier  →  Ran 13 tests OK exit=0

ARTIFACTS (sha256)
- sop_episode_verifier.py: 0507afe8473f3c50df246a0799f6f8c2f866a8a93ffcfc9f99133371143cc7ff
- raw_data_full_report.json (re-run at 0.10 rad): 200c2b7669d05e123955f45623e2e9218d8b3465ffba450e8efd3f10dff487b2
- initial_batch_manifest.json (re-built at 0.10 rad): d2f9c10938de6d521b2a814f3cf0827679688059e9432671c0f1b5c888ee53c7

REPRODUCE
- ~/miniconda3/envs/robo_ctrl/bin/python ~/workspace/ARX_A5_Dual_ARM/data_collection/sop_episode_verifier.py --root ~/workspace/raw_data --report ~/workspace/.verifier_reports/raw_data_full_report.json
- For strict tier (eval set): add --stillness-threshold-rad 0.02

DOWNSTREAM
- task_drag_demo_initial_batch stays needs_user: 19/100 known-good now, still need 81 physical demos (onsite work, not remotely reproducible).
- task_drag_demo_reach_100_manifest can proceed: manifest format is finalized; operators only need to feed new collections through the verifier and append new entries.

comments.body:
Schema v1 + writer + reader + validator + 10s fake-episode E2E shipped.

== Repo + commit ==

  ------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------
  schema           | DONE   | src/real_robot_record/schema.py + docs/schema.md
  sample writer    | DONE   | src/real_robot_record/writer.py (EpisodeWriter)

== Verifier 1: pytest (offline, no hardware) ==

Result: 23 passed in 0.20 s
Coverage:

== Verifier 2: 10s fake-episode E2E ==

Commands:

    manifest.json   6184 bytes   sha256=f307d5580bdb8961a5c0601b95e2f9aafa965df636280bf28d74ab0dec9034ea

HDF5 inventory (verified by h5py inspection):
  /streams/wuji_glove_right__tactile          ts_us(1200) seq(1200) frame_id(1200) data(1200,768)float32
  /streams/wuji_glove_right__hand_joint_angles ts_us(1200) seq(1200) frame_id(1200) joint_angles(1200,21)float32
  /streams/wuji_glove_right__imu_palm          ts_us(1200) seq(1200) frame_id(1200) orientation(1200,4) angular_velocity(1200,3) acceleration(1200,3) all float32
  /streams/manus_right__hand_skeleton          ts_us(1200) seq(1200) frame_id(1200) keypoints(1200,21,3)float32
  /streams/vive_right_wrist__pose              ts_us(1200) seq(1200) frame_id(1200) pose(1200,4,4)float32
  /streams/franka_left__joint_state            ts_us(500)  seq(500)  frame_id(500)  q(500,7) qdot(500,7) ee_pose(500,4,4) all float64
  /streams/camera_color_0__extrinsics          ts_us(1) seq(1) frame_id(1) T_world_cam(1,4,4)float64

Validator output:

Verifier logs (all in ~/.claude/jobs/real_robot_record/):
  write_fake.log  sha256=821f0e1bae575e095b0d02e907b95a2eb59331e41426a7d8c011ebd8da6ac496
  validate.log    sha256=e2670d64a0c2000ccb2d6996453b6f632a0d76096053ba8ac902a3c76948242d

== Schema highlights ==

- SCHEMA_VERSION = 'real_robot_record.v1' (validator hard-rejects mismatches).
- All ts_us are host wall-clock UTC μs = int(time.time()*1e6) on the recorder.
  Cross-stream alignment bound (recommended): 50 ms.
- canonical_stream_id(device, name) = f"{device}__{name}" — no '__' allowed in
  either component; reserved field names ts_us/seq/frame_id cannot be reused
  as payload field names.
- Calibration matrices live in manifest only (small, human-editable). Stream
  payloads stay in HDF5 (binary, compressed).
- KNOWN_STREAM_KINDS is a closed enum for warnings; unknown kinds are
  warnings-by-default so the schema extends forward without a bump.

Status -> review. Companion repos using this schema:
  /home/boris/workspace/vive_wrapper       (MANUS+VIVE fusion -> FusedHandFrame -> can be appended to wrist_pose / hand_skeleton streams)
  /home/boris/workspace/wuji_glove_wrapper (FrameSample collected by net-smoke -> can be appended to tactile / imu / hand_joints streams)
  /home/boris/workspace/manus_wrapper      (GloveFrame.to_mediapipe() -> hand_skeleton stream)

Suggested follow-ups (separate TODOs):
  1. End-to-end wiring: an orchestrator that scans connected devices, calls
     the right wrapper per device kind, and feeds each frame into EpisodeWriter.
     Blocked on hardware (Wuji glove link, MANUS glove pairing, VIVE/SteamVR).
  2. Foxglove / mcap export for visualisation (h5 -> mcap is a tight loop).
  3. Validator profile flags for retargeting (e.g. require at least one
     wrist_pose stream when a hand_skeleton stream is present).

comments.author: Blocker
comments.body:
Network smoke implemented + offline-verified; blocked on link-level connectivity.

== Repo + commit ==

Worktree: /home/boris/workspace/wuji_glove_wrapper
Branch:   main
Commit:   6fbdb3725c8db393f613469e40a8977ea5b19097  ('Add 10s network-smoke script + offline metrics module')

Files (sha256):
  scripts/glove_net_smoke.py            bc2efca9117a4cc35b41f77ac05bcf83f1757a2eb9e9117a0a9582f5836c4507
  src/wuji_glove_wrapper/metrics.py     ec6d5844c928ec1c60bf4e9e4f98d8711ac40bcf5bbf6f92ebe493e292849c6a
  tests/test_metrics.py                 9b29d00154543fb84eb452d3d26e19deb4bf7b7e28641094de31797cd629f748

== Offline verifier (passes without glove on the wire) ==

Command:
  cd ~/workspace/wuji_glove_wrapper && ~/workspace/wuji_wrapper/.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -v
Result: 9 passed in 0.09s
Coverage: empty input / 120 Hz perfect / seq-gap drop counting / constant +5 ms drift / linearly growing drift / inter-arrival jitter / reorder safety / _percentile interpolation / schema_of attribute walk.
Log:    /home/boris/.claude/jobs/wuji_glove_net/tests.log
sha256: 2df20e810d9c45eefe60092e1f5749b4383c54d0aad5050b11229006c9e327c3

== Smoke runner — actual 10 s run on this host, captured concrete blocker ==

Command:
  ~/workspace/wuji_wrapper/.venv/bin/python ~/workspace/wuji_glove_wrapper/scripts/glove_net_smoke.py
  (default --duration 10.0 --iface enp58s0 --ips 192.168.1.100,192.168.1.101)

Stdout:
  [wuji-net-smoke] log     : /home/boris/.claude/jobs/wuji_glove_net/smoke.json
  [wuji-net-smoke] sha256  : b8707f78071fa98f3d97426993ef2921bf5612196df5d0c4b8a6e55d84ba1d3b
  [wuji-net-smoke] blocker : iface_enp58s0_no_carrier (cable unplugged or Wuji USB-C-to-Ethernet power adapter off; expected static IP 192.168.1.10/24 on host, glove at .100/.101)
  [wuji-net-smoke] devices : 0
  [wuji-net-smoke] frames  : 0
Exit: 2

Log artifacts:
  /home/boris/.claude/jobs/wuji_glove_net/smoke.json                 sha256=b8707f78071fa98f3d97426993ef2921bf5612196df5d0c4b8a6e55d84ba1d3b
  /home/boris/.claude/jobs/wuji_glove_net/smoke_no_carrier_10s.json  (frozen copy of the above)

JSON payload structure (schema_version wuji_glove_net_smoke.v1):
  host, duration_s, started_at_utc_us, ended_at_utc_us
  iface_state { iface, exists, carrier, operstate }
  udp_probes [ { ip, port, reachable, error } ]
  sdk { available, version }
  devices [ { sn, ip, port, transport_type, firmware_version, hand_side, ... } ]
  streams { <sn>: { <stream>: StreamMetrics } }
  blocker (string or null)
  total_frames, elapsed_s
  StreamMetrics: { stream, frame_count, duration_s, rate_hz, seq_min, seq_max,
                   seq_drop_count, seq_gap_max,
                   drift_us_{min,max,mean,p50,p95},
                   interarrival_us_{mean,std},
                   schema {type, fields:{<attr>:{type,len}}} }

== Concrete hardware/network blocker ==

iface_state (from /sys/class/net/enp58s0/{carrier,operstate}):
  carrier=0 operstate=down

Earlier verified-good state (per dashboard comment clawcross_34a5c74c0249, 2026-05-22 16:49):
  enp58s0: 192.168.1.10/24 static, ping 192.168.1.101 -> 4/4 RTT 0.12-0.20 ms, SDK pulled 7 streams from SN WG1KA02260410009.

What changed since then to drop the link is hardware-side (cable unplugged / glove adapter unpowered / glove off). I cannot bring enp58s0 up without sudo + a physical cable check. Per master-control instructions: not retrying with sudo.

== What's needed to clear this blocker (no sudo from me) ==

A human/local Codex needs to (in order):
  1. Plug the Wuji USB-C-to-Ethernet adapter's RJ45 into enp58s0 (Arm A's old port).
  2. Confirm the adapter's DC power barrel is in (the adapter should hum / LED on).
  3. Power on the glove(s); the wrist LED should breath cyan ~4 s in standby.
  4. Re-apply the static IP on host:
       sudo ip addr add 192.168.1.10/24 dev enp58s0
       sudo ip link set enp58s0 up
     (or whichever NM/networkd profile was used before)
  5. Verify: ping -c 2 192.168.1.101  (or .100 for left glove)
  6. Re-run the smoke:
       ~/workspace/wuji_wrapper/.venv/bin/python ~/workspace/wuji_glove_wrapper/scripts/glove_net_smoke.py
     Expected (per earlier good run): 7 streams populated, rate_hz ~120 for tactile, seq_drop_count low, drift_us mean within ~1 ms (SDK syncs to host clock).

Once the link is back the script collects the full 10 s window and produces the acceptance-criteria deliverable in one run with no further code changes.

== Status ==

Setting needs_user / blocked on physical link. Implementation is committed & offline-verified. Will move to task_real_robot_input_record_schema (the second TODO on this rotation) while waiting on hardware.

comments.author: Blocker
comments.body:
Re-check after user request to verify connection recovery: NO, hardware link has NOT come back. Re-ran smoke to capture fresh evidence.

== Current link state (2026-05-23) ==

ip -brief link:
  enp58s0          DOWN           b4:45:06:b2:a5:42 <NO-CARRIER,BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP>
  enx2c16dbac331f  DOWN           2c:16:db:ac:33:1f <NO-CARRIER,BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP>
  wlp0s20f3        UP             10.249.234.23/16  (wifi only; not the Wuji path)
  lo / tailscale0  UP

/sys/class/net/enp58s0/carrier = 0
/sys/class/net/enp58s0/operstate = down

ethtool enp58s0:
  Speed: Unknown!
  Duplex: Unknown! (255)
  master-slave status: unknown
  (these values are the canonical 'no physical link' readout)

ping -c 2 -W 1 192.168.1.101  ->  100% packet loss
ping -c 2 -W 1 192.168.1.100  ->  100% packet loss

dmesg / journalctl -k blocked under this worker's policy (no sudo); cannot inspect the USB-C-to-Ethernet adapter's kernel-side enumeration directly.

== Re-run of the smoke ==

Command:
  ~/workspace/wuji_wrapper/.venv/bin/python ~/workspace/wuji_glove_wrapper/scripts/glove_net_smoke.py \
      --out ~/.claude/jobs/wuji_glove_net/smoke_retry.json

Output:
  [wuji-net-smoke] log     : /home/boris/.claude/jobs/wuji_glove_net/smoke_retry.json
  [wuji-net-smoke] sha256  : d9b1044869537a5079675201cd74081c76e5068065eb8a1abfb1fc7f2cee8496
  [wuji-net-smoke] blocker : iface_enp58s0_no_carrier (cable unplugged or Wuji USB-C-to-Ethernet power adapter off; expected static IP 192.168.1.10/24 on host, glove at .100/.101)
  [wuji-net-smoke] devices : 0
  [wuji-net-smoke] frames  : 0
Exit: 2

JSON evidence:
  /home/boris/.claude/jobs/wuji_glove_net/smoke_retry.json
  sha256=d9b1044869537a5079675201cd74081c76e5068065eb8a1abfb1fc7f2cee8496
  started_at_utc_us=1779474628811325
  ended_at_utc_us=1779474628811577
  blocker=iface_enp58s0_no_carrier
  iface_state={'carrier':'0','exists':True,'iface':'enp58s0','operstate':'down'}
  devices=[]

== Why I cannot fix this from this worker ==

Bringing the link up requires physical / privileged actions I am not allowed to perform:

  1. Physically plug the Wuji USB-C-to-Ethernet adapter's RJ45 into enp58s0
     (Arm A's old port). [需要人工]
  2. Confirm the adapter's DC power barrel is in and the adapter LED is on.
     [需要人工]
  3. Power on the glove(s) — wrist LED should breathe cyan ~4 s in standby.
     [需要人工]
  4. After link comes up:
       sudo ip addr add 192.168.1.10/24 dev enp58s0
       sudo ip link set enp58s0 up
     (or whichever NM/networkd profile was used to re-apply previously)
     [需要 sudo — 我策略上不被允许]

Once any of those steps changes /sys/class/net/enp58s0/carrier to 1 and a
ping to 192.168.1.101 succeeds, the same smoke command will populate the
streams[]/devices[] sections and emit the full 10-second log automatically.

== Status ==

Leaving as blocked / needs_user. The implementation is committed (commit
6fbdb37) and pre-verified offline (9/9 pytest). No code change is needed
to clear this — only physical cable / power / sudo on the host.

To request the user run the recovery: please re-plug the Wuji USB-C-to-Ethernet
adapter on enp58s0 with DC power and the glove on, then re-apply the
192.168.1.10/24 static IP, then re-run:
  ~/workspace/wuji_wrapper/.venv/bin/python ~/workspace/wuji_glove_wrapper/scripts/glove_net_smoke.py

tasks.title: 定义 object/contact annotation pack 并标注样例
tasks.description: Why now: HOI retargeting 目标不是关节相似，而是 object trajectory/contact/task result。Deliverable: contact patch、contact normal、grasp/tool-use mode、object pose trajectory 的 label spec + 5 个样例。Acceptance: 标注能喂给 retargeting baseline 或 Isaac verifier。

comments.author: Progress
comments.body: [2026-05-23] Contact pack v0 done. Artifacts: contact_pack_spec.md (additive layer over hoi.v0: per-frame phase + grasp_mode_v2, per-patch frame_world_4x4 + link_name + patch_id + area + force_proxy + friction_mu + is_held_constraint, tool_use block, object_trajectory_summary), generate_contact_pack_samples.py, validate_contact_pack.py, samples_contact_pack/01_pinch_pick_coin.json + 02_power_grasp_mug.json + 03_tool_use_screwdriver.json + 04_slide_block.json + 05_release_cup.json. 5 samples cover the 5 high-frequency cases: tip_pinch (2 patches), power_cylindrical (5 patches), tool_use (3 hand patches + explicit tool_tip / target / axis), lateral sliding (single patch with low load_bearing), release (4 patches -> 0 across the timeline). All 5 PASS validate_contact_pack.py (which chains validate_hoi_schema.py then layers patch SE(3) / +z=normal / area / friction / grasp_mode_v2 / tool_use / patch_id-link consistency / trajectory summary). Each sample carries the fields the Isaac verifier needs: object endpoint pose, per-patch SE(3) frames, link_name, friction, tool_tip targets. Grasp v2 taxonomy in spec §5 (9 values, Cutkosky-derived). Open issues §9: patch frame labeller tool, force calibration, multi-object scenes, patch-id reassignment. Next: feed these into task_hoi_isaac_retargeting_verifier_v0.

tasks.title: 做 Isaac retargeting verifier v0
tasks.description: Why now: 已经决定要用 Isaac 判断机器人是否复现同一 object-state transition。Deliverable: 一个 v0 verifier，输入 human HOI label + robot candidate trajectory，输出 object pose/contact/joint-limit/collision/failure report。Acceptance: 能在 mock scene 上跑通，并给出可解释 reject reason。

comments.author: Progress
comments.body: [2026-05-23] Verifier v0 done (mock-Isaac, no physics import needed). Artifacts: isaac_verifier_v0.py (orchestrator + 9 checks), generate_mock_robot_candidates.py (good + bad case), mock_robots/good_mug_pick.json + bad_mug_pick.json, verifier-v0-spec.md (schema, check table, demo, v1 plan). Robot candidate schema 'robot_candidate.v0' covers joint_names/joint_q/joint_qdot/joint_limits/links_per_frame/predicted_object_pose/predicted_contact_intent/collision_spheres/scene_obstacles. Verify() runs 9 checks: human_label_valid, robot_candidate_valid, schema_align, joint_limits, self_collision, scene_collision, object_pose (RMSE+end pos+end rot), contact_phase_timeline (F1), sliding_consistency (cos). Demo run on samples_contact_pack/02_power_grasp_mug.json: good_mug_pick.json => exit 0, overall_pass=true, 9/9 green; bad_mug_pick.json => exit 1, 4 explicit reject reasons (joint_limits[panda_joint5 q=3.5 at frame 3 vs limit [-2.8973,2.8973]], scene_collision[tool0 vs table aabb at frame 2 distance 0.0 vs radius 0.04], object_pose[end_position_err 0.06 m > tol 0.03 m, RMSE 0.0367 m < tol 0.05 m], contact_phase_timeline[F1=0.667 < tol 0.7]). Every violation carries frame index + offending value so the retargeting solver can target the specific failure. Acceptance: runs on mock scene, gives interpretable reject reasons. v1 plan (Isaac backend, URDF-driven limits, PhysX collisions, friction-cone/penetration checks, patch-id match) listed in spec §7. Known gaps (no physics, no FK, no mass/friction) listed in §6.

tasks.title: 同一任务跑两个采集模态 smoke
tasks.description: Why now: collection matrix/schema 都完成了，下一步要证明同一任务能跨模态对齐。Deliverable: 选一个 manipulation task，至少 glove/UMI 或 teleop/drag 两个模态各出 1 条样例。Acceptance: 两条样例共享 task_id/object_id/timestamps/camera metadata，并能在同一 schema validator 中通过。

comments.author: Progress
comments.body: [Codex route 2026-05-23] Route: start with two modalities on one identical task, not all modalities. The acceptance artifact is a common object-centric timeline: object pose/velocity, contact intent, hand/robot state, camera extrinsics, and success outcome. DexMachina and FoundationPose support functional/object-state retargeting rather than joint-angle imitation.

comments.author: Progress
comments.body: [2026-05-23] Smoke v0 done. Workspace: ~/workspace/diverse-same-task-dataset. Artifacts: hoi_schema.md (schema v0 contract + per-modality payload table), validate_hoi_schema.py (single-file CLI validator), generate_samples.py (emits the three sample clips), samples/sample_glove_pick_cup.json + sample_umi_pick_cup.json + sample_umi_pick_cup_BAD.json. Both valid clips share task_id='pick_red_cup_v1', object_id='red_cup_001', identical timestamps_us cadence (5 frames @ 50 ms), identical camera intrinsics/extrinsics structure, and identical canonical object endpoint (cup lifted 12 cm). Validator results: glove VALID exit=0, umi VALID exit=0, BAD INVALID exit=1 with the 4 planted reasons surfaced (missing object_id, non-monotonic timestamps, broken quat norm, broken normal norm). Acceptance: two modalities encoded under one schema, same task/object/timeline/camera fields, validator green on both. Required-field contract is documented in hoi_schema.md §3; per-modality optional payload in §4. Open issues (camera convention REP-103 vs OpenCV, pose_source enum, multi-object extension, proprio promotion) listed in §8. Hand-off to task_hoi_contact_annotation_pack: contact_intent[] is the field that grows; current spec has state enum + patch list + grasp_mode, next iteration will add per-frame phase and oriented patch frames.

tasks.title: GELLO 末端从 trigger 改 ACE-style 腕环 + MANUS 手姿态
tasks.description: 现有 GELLO 仍负责 Franka/GELLO 机械臂 joint-space teleop；改动只发生在末端：把原本采集夹爪开合的 trigger 模块替换/扩展成 ACE Teleop-style wrist ring。不要用 ACE 的 hand-facing camera 做手姿态估计；手部姿势、手指开合和 retargeting 输入由 MANUS glove 提供。Deliverable: GELLO A67/trigger 末端到 ACE wrist ring 的机械结合草图、保留/删除件清单、MANUS signal path、wrist ring 输出字段、线缆/快拆/限位方案，以及 first print fit-check。

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Design clarification after checking the references:
- GELLO side: keep the Franka FR3 GELLO arm chain and joint-space teleop logic. The relevant mechanical interface is the distal A67/trigger area; the Franka FR3 mechanical folder includes `20_TRIGGER_BODY.STL`, `21_TRIGGER_FINGER.STL`, and trigger storage parts, so this is the region to replace or adapt.
- ACE side: borrow only the WRIST / wearable exoskeleton geometry concept. Do not use ACE's hand-facing camera path, because MANUS glove provides the hand pose and finger state.
- Proposed merge: make an adapter that bolts onto the GELLO distal trigger mount / A67 connector and carries an ACE-style wrist ring or cuff. The ring should provide comfortable wrist anchoring / intent input and cable routing, while MANUS streams hand posture into the retargeting stack.
- First CAD target: a non-electrical fit-check print with wrist-ring size, quick-release/strap, cable exit, and hard-stop clearance; after fit passes, add any buttons/sensors only if needed.

comments.author: Progress
comments.body: 本机 Codex 已在 `/home/boris/workspace/real_robot_record/docs/hardware_plans/2026-05-27_general_hardware_deliverables.md` sha256 `90cfa70814869c88dc7f0fc62d555a71594df297857cbaaa30928b52d83d470b` 写入 GELLO trigger -> ACE-style wrist ring + MANUS signal-path design package: keep/delete list, mechanical merge, wrist-ring output schema, cable/quick-release/limit plan, and first-print fit-check criteria。保持 active: dashboard acceptance 还包含 first print fit-check，需 CAD owner 打印并实测舒适度、MANUS cable clearance、GELLO distal sweep collision。

tasks.description: Move this from the UMI-specific storage lane into General engineering. Decision: buy the Taobao 7-day no-reason-return item "企业团队云硬盘盒NAS局域网共享权限自动备份远程访问WIFI" (short link: https://e.tb.cn/h.R4yF4iTokRMx0ei?tk=YJOJ5Dl6aXt, code HU006) and use the existing 10T hard drive as a group shared-file NAS for lab computers. Acceptance: confirm the purchased NAS enclosure supports the actual 10T HDD form factor/interface and power needs; install the disk; configure LAN/Wi-Fi access, shared folders, user/group permissions, automatic backup, and remote-access policy; record stable hostname/IP, SMB/NFS/WebDAV or vendor client path, filesystem/volume state, simple read/write throughput from at least one group computer, and any 7-day return decision if compatibility fails.

tasks.title: 跟踪四个 drag-demo 微调方案结果
tasks.description: 当前数据已全部 replay 至少一遍；十几条 gripper-tip 交互方式的数据已剔除，保留 90 条 gripper-face 交互数据。四个方案正在训练: (1) 75 train / 10 validation / 5 test 原始手部视觉；(2) 同样 split，但把手部区域替换成灰色背景；(3) 90 条全部训练，原始手部视觉；(4) 90 条全部训练，手部区域替换成灰色背景。Acceptance: 收集四个 run 的 checkpoint、训练/validation 曲线、test 或真机部署结果；明确 Plan 1 vs Plan 2 的手部视觉影响，Plan 1 vs Plan 3 的数据量影响，并决定是否追加原始数据 + 干净 replay 数据的混合配比实验。

comments.author: Boris
comments.body: Update from Boris: all data has been replayed at least once. A dozen-plus episodes were removed because they used a different interaction style, contacting with the gripper tip instead of the gripper face. Current clean dataset has 90 episodes. Four training schemes are running: Plan 1 = 75 train / 10 validation / 5 test; Plan 2 = same split but hand region replaced by gray background; Plan 3 = all 90 for training; Plan 4 = all 90 for training with hand region replaced by gray background. Plan 1 vs Plan 2 measures whether hand visual representation affects real-robot deployment interaction. Plan 1 vs Plan 3 measures whether more data helps. After these four results, consider mixing original raw data and clean replay data.

tasks.title: 购买两根 USB 3.0 延长线
tasks.description: Buy two USB 3.0 extension cables from Shopee for lab hardware routing. Before checkout, confirm whether the lab/group card can be used directly for this Shopee purchase; if not, use the approved reimbursement or procurement path. Acceptance: choose cable length and connector type (likely USB-A male-to-female unless the target devices require otherwise); confirm USB 3.0 / 5Gbps rating, shielding, and enough current stability for cameras/sensors; record product link, price, receipt/invoice, payer path, and delivery ETA; after arrival, test both cables with the intended device, confirm the device enumerates as SuperSpeed/USB3 where applicable, and note any dropouts or bandwidth/power issues.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: User request: General needs two more USB 3.0 extension cables, likely to buy on Shopee. Procurement note: do not assume direct group-card payment is approved; ask the card holder / PI / lab admin before checkout. If direct card use is not allowed, use the normal reimbursement or procurement route and keep the receipt/invoice.

tasks.title: 启动 Jenga 抽积木塔 tactile pilot
tasks.description: 找一个 master 同学做小型 Jenga-style block extraction / 抽积木塔练手任务：机器人从木块塔里推出或抽出指定木块，同时尽量不让塔倒。用 VTA/VLA 模型学习触觉辅助的接触稳定、摩擦/滑移、侧向推力、塔体晃动和失败恢复；配一个可打印/定制的特殊 gripper，并接入戴盟触觉。目标是把 slip、contact stability、lateral force、tower wobble、tower collapse 等失败变成通用硬件平台的测试样例；后续需要时再被 AgenticSim 或 VLA/VTLA 项目引用。
tasks.assignee: master student TBD / Zheng Yuhang for gripper timing

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Scope note from Boris: Jenga-style block extraction / 抽积木塔 can be a compact training/evaluation task for a master student. Use Daimon tactile sensing and a special gripper; ask Zheng Yuhang whether the Daimon-side gripper package matched to the previous UMI gripper is ready and when it can be brought to Singapore.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Naming correction: this is not generic stacking. The intended object is Jenga-style block extraction / 抽积木塔: push or pull one wooden block out of a tower while preserving tower stability. The useful tactile signals are slip, lateral force, contact stability, tower wobble, and collapse risk.

comments.author: Needs user
comments.body: 本机 Codex 已在 `/home/boris/workspace/real_robot_record/docs/hardware_plans/2026-05-27_general_hardware_deliverables.md` sha256 `90cfa70814869c88dc7f0fc62d555a71594df297857cbaaa30928b52d83d470b` 写入 Jenga-style block extraction tactile pilot scope: goal, hardware, protocol, metrics, and owner handoff。剩余 blocker 不是文档而是人员/硬件: 需要指定 master student，并确认 Zheng Yuhang/Daimon 触觉 gripper package 是否 ready 以及何时到新加坡。

tasks.title: 写 Linker TA + Linker FFG wrapper
tasks.description: Linker TA + Linker FFG 组合还没有 wrapper。Deliverable: 一个最小 Python wrapper / CLI，能连接设备、读取状态、发送 gripper open/close 或 position/force command、记录错误码/时间戳，并输出 10 秒 smoke log。Acceptance: 无硬件时能给 actionable dependency report；有硬件时能完成 connect -> state -> command -> state -> disconnect 的 verifier。

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Scope note: this belongs in Real-Robot Lab Infra, not General, because it is a concrete ready-device integration wrapper. Keep it small first: connection config, status readback, command path, smoke verifier, and clear blocker output when hardware or SDK docs are missing.

comments.author: Host verification
comments.body: 本机 Codex 在 boris@100.70.181.44 的 `~/workspace/teleop_retarget` 新增最小 Linker TA + FFG smoke CLI: `scripts/linker_ta_ffg_smoke.py`。验证: `.venv/bin/python -m py_compile scripts/linker_ta_ffg_smoke.py` 通过；真实运行 `.venv/bin/python scripts/linker_ta_ffg_smoke.py --duration 10 --side both` 退出 0 并生成报告。Artifacts: `/home/boris/workspace/teleop_retarget/smoke_logs/linker_ta_ffg_smoke_20260527_005813.md` sha256 `ee252b039aa10502bfa1591f776129cf7348447ed269268e987aa5a959dc9743`; JSON `/home/boris/workspace/teleop_retarget/smoke_logs/linker_ta_ffg_smoke_20260527_005813.json` sha256 `ad028cfbb8a96a5f419fa1b96cb4430f56bae585100bb64a953c90db20ebd187`. 当前硬件状态: `/dev/ttyUSB0` 和 `/dev/ttyUSB1` 可打开但 10 秒内无有效 21-float FFG frame；Linker Hand L6 command path import OK，但未发现 `can0`/`can1`，因此未尝试 open/fist/open。报告给出下一步: replug/确认 FFG LFFG1-01/baud 2000000，并 bring up `can0`/`can1` at 1 Mbps 或运行 `submodules/linkerhand_sdk/find_can.sh`。

comments.author: Codex strict audit
comments.body: Strict audit 2026-05-29: reopened because prior closure was wrapper/no-hardware smoke evidence. Full acceptance requires Linker TA + FFG dependencies installed and either a real hardware command log or a concrete hardware-unavailable blocker with command output.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: Strict validation 2026-05-29: teleop_retarget uv sync --all-extras and compileall succeeded. Real Linker TA/FFG smoke reported ffg_no_frames on /dev/ttyUSB0 and /dev/ttyUSB1 plus missing can0/can1 for Linker Hand; hardware/CAN setup required.

tasks.title: 更新 Cosmos Predict 2.5 双腕拼接 system prompt
tasks.description: Rewrite the Cosmos Predict 2.5 system prompt for UMI concatenated wrist views. It must say: the image/video is a horizontal concatenation; left half is the left wrist/gripper view; right half is the right wrist/gripper view; lower visible gripper parts are the interactive end-effectors; keep left/right identity, object state, contact geometry, and gripper-object interaction consistent. Acceptance: save the prompt template and run or dry-run it on representative clips.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Prompt wording should prevent Cosmos from treating the concatenated frame as a generic collage. It needs explicit semantics for left wrist, right wrist, and visible lower gripper parts as interactive robot end-effectors.

comments.author: Host verification
comments.body: Local Codex accepted the Cosmos Predict 2.5 dual-wrist prompt update. Verified artifacts on jingxiang@100.112.245.1: prompt package, caption renderer, TI2V input builder, and Cosmos25 inference entrypoint under `.claude/worktrees/cosmos25-dual-wrist-prompt/`. Existing validations include py_compile pass, dry-run prompt render, and three live Gemini caption validation JSONs with schema_ok=true. Evidence: `eval_outputs/harness_reports/task_umi_cosmos25_concat_prompt_update.md`.

tasks.title: 调研 UMI action 注入路径
tasks.description: Compare practical ways to inject robot action into the UMI world model: (1) text/action tokens in prompt, (2) first-frame plus structured caption, (3) trajectory/control maps rendered into image/video conditions, (4) extra latent/input channels for pose/gripper maps, (5) cross-attention or adapter tokens, (6) AdaLN/time-step modulation with action embeddings, (7) Ctrl-World-style action-conditioned UNet/action encoder, and (8) discrete action tokenization. Acceptance: produce a short decision table with implementation cost, expected action faithfulness, dual-arm support, compatibility with WAN2.2 TI2V, and recommended v1 path.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: Initial framing: WAN2.2 TI2V supports text+image conditioning, but UMI needs action faithfulness beyond first-frame appearance. Use Ctrl-World/action-conditioned video models and LingBot-style active world simulation as references, then choose the smallest WAN-compatible v1 injection method.

comments.author: Host verification
comments.body: Local Codex accepted the UMI action-injection survey after adding an explicit decision table. Evidence: `/home/jingxiang/workspace/das-data/eval_outputs/harness_reports/task_umi_action_injection_survey.md`. Recommendation: short-term action-aware prompt ablation via `caption_with_keystates.py`; medium-term Ctrl-World-style numerical action encoder using `test_sets/ctrlworld/actions_15hz.npz` `(120,16)` dual-arm action tensors.

comments.author: Codex strict audit
comments.body: Strict audit 2026-05-29: reopened because survey-only is not enough. Produce a runnable action-injection probe or model-integration patch with verification outputs.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: Strict audit 2026-05-29: survey-only evidence is not accepted as done under the current rule; needs an implemented/runnable action-injection path or explicit blocker.

Use the Hugging Face model card as the source: base model Wan2.2-5B-TI2V, DreamX transformer weights, PRoPE camera conditioning, single input image + caption + action_seq/action_speed_list JSON, and camera commands such as w/s/a/d/j/k/l/h. comments.body: Reference checked 2026-05-27: https://huggingface.co/GD-ML/DreamX-World-5B-Cam describes a 5B camera-control variant built on Wan2.2-T2V/TI2V, with 704x1280 video, 5s at 24fps or 16fps, PRoPE camera conditioning, bfloat16 precision, xfuser multi-GPU support, and input JSON fields image_path/caption/action_seq/action_speed_list. This TODO should answer whether it can become a WMFactory backend for UMI camera/action-conditioned world-model probes.

tasks.title: 把 WMFactory 和 iWorld-Bench 结合成交互世界模型评测前端
tasks.description: Integrate WMFactory / WMBackend with EmbodiedCity/iWorld-Bench so UMI World Model has both WMFactory's user-interaction frontend and iWorld-Bench-style benchmarking for interactive world models. Source: https://github.com/EmbodiedCity/iWorld-Bench. Deliverable: clone/vendor or reference iWorld-Bench at a fixed commit; map WMFactory generated-video outputs and model adapters into iWorld-Bench metadata / camera-trajectory / evaluation inputs; expose a WMFactory UI or API entry that can launch benchmark jobs and show reports; support at least action_control and camera_following evaluation, with memory_ability/all noted as feasible or blocked; include compatibility notes for VIPE_ROOT, VBENCH_ROOT, dataset/all_pack metadata, camera_trajectories, and generated video output layout. Acceptance: one small dry-run or smoke benchmark using WMFactory-produced or fixture videos; generated reports under eval_outputs with command logs, JSON/CSV report paths, sha256, and a short recommendation on how to use iWorld-Bench scores alongside the existing UMI eval gallery.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: Reference checked 2026-05-29: EmbodiedCity/iWorld-Bench is a benchmark for camera-controllable / interactive world models. The repo provides run_iworldbench_evaluation.py, unified_video_metrics.py, camera_trajectories, packaged dataset metadata, reference inference demos, and metrics including action_control, memory_ability, camera_following, and all. The integration goal is to keep WMFactory's user-interaction frontend while adding iWorld-Bench benchmarking outputs for generated videos.

tasks.title: 用 AffinityOnLinux / GIMP 替代 Photoshop 分图层流程
tasks.description: Ubuntu 没有 Photoshop 时，把 agentic prompt 生成的固定位置分元素图片接到 Linux 可运行的图层编辑流程。优先评估两条路线：(1) seapear/AffinityOnLinux: 通过 Wine 在 GNU/Linux 上运行 Affinity Photo/Designer/Publisher，用来复现 PSD/图层检查体验；(2) GIMP: 原生免费开源图像编辑器，作为可脚本化 baseline。Acceptance: 记录 AffinityOnLinux 安装/启动可行性或 blocker；写出 GIMP 批处理或 Script-Fu/Python-Fu 路线；对 poster 和 robot_still 各跑一次白底去除、透明图层叠加、原始相对位置保持、layer naming、导出 .xcf/.afphoto 或 PSD/PNG round-trip；输出 reconstruction diff、缺失/重复元素检查、命令/log/sha256 和最终推荐的 Ubuntu 默认路线。

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: Reference checked 2026-05-27: https://github.com/seapear/AffinityOnLinux is a community guide for running Affinity software on GNU/Linux with Wine, recommending routes such as Wine 10.17+, Lutris, Heroic, Bottles, or Rum and warning that it is not affiliated with Serif/Canva. https://www.gimp.org/ describes GIMP as a cross-platform free/open-source image editor available on GNU/Linux, macOS, Windows, with scripting/plugin extensibility. Use AffinityOnLinux for a closer Photoshop-like editor if feasible, and GIMP as the native reproducible fallback.

comments.author: Host verification
comments.body: 本机 Codex 在 feibo@100.87.220.29 的 `~/workspace/image-layered-world-model` 完成 Ubuntu 分图层替代流程。`linux_layer_editor_pipeline.py` sha256 `3f1e3e3a8d6572e5c58d6be89c2579a6f7f33bc1f1d91e31f410f66fbd956af2`，运行 `.venv/bin/python linux_layer_editor_pipeline.py --cases poster robot_still` 退出 0。Report `/home/feibo/workspace/image-layered-world-model/outputs_linux_layer_editor/linux_layer_editor_report.md` sha256 `ce8f6dd98876d7ae36d1e885542bdd8661eaeb85da12b8e2dea605b2ff3c2c4b`; summary `/home/feibo/workspace/image-layered-world-model/outputs_linux_layer_editor/summary.json` sha256 `901485a8a4783472240fc96a26a114cb3415ae4e97fc4434d3a36ddf91c397db`。结果: poster recon_l1_rgb=0.040050、无 duplicate pairs；robot_still recon_l1_rgb=0.010391、duplicate pair 0_1 被标出；两个 case 均导出命名透明 PNG、diff map 和 raw PSD roundtrip。环境结论: AffinityOnLinux blocked because Wine/Affinity missing；GIMP binary missing，所以生成了 GIMP-ready batch script 但未导出 XCF。推荐 Ubuntu 默认路线为 Python/Pillow+pytoshop 的 CI-verifiable PNG/PSD roundtrip，GIMP 仅作为安装后人工 XCF 检查。

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: Strict validation 2026-05-29: existing report shows pytoshop PSD route works, but GIMP/Wine/Affinity are missing on yuhang-B850M-C. sudo requires a password, so GIMP cannot be installed non-interactively; keep blocked until GIMP/Affinity is installed or sudo is provided.
